  • Appendix
  • Templates
  • District
  • District Fact Template for Title I

District Fact Template for Title I

(11 Fields, 8 Collected, Delimited)

Target Table: DISTRICT_FACT

Load Sequence/Dependencies

No dependencies

note

Each LEA must provide a response for each question in Appendix AE.

Template Specifications​

1 - SUBMITTING AUN​

RequiredKeyMax Length: 9

The unique, 9-digit AUN assigned by the PDE.

Sample / Valid Value:

All LEA and School Numbers can be found on the EdNA website.

123456789

eScholar Name: DISTRICT CODE

2 - SCHOOL YEAR DATE​

RequiredKeyMax Length: 10

A single date (June 30), the last day of the current school year indicating the whole school year.

Sample / Valid Value:

2024-06-30

eScholar Name: REPORTING DATE

3 - CATEGORY 1​

RequiredKeyMax Length: 6

Sample / Valid Value:

See Appendix AE for a complete list of valid values.

TAS

4 - CATEGORY 2​

RequiredKeyMax Length: 9

Sample / Valid Value:

See Appendix AE for a complete list of valid values.

GRADE

5 - CATEGORY 3​

Conditionally RequiredKeyMax Length: 7

Sample / Valid Value:

See Appendix AE for a complete list of valid values.

KDG

6 - MEASURE TYPE​

RequiredKeyMax Length: 7

Sample / Valid Value:

See Appendix AE for a complete list of valid values.

COUNT

7 - COUNT​

Conditionally RequiredUpdateableMax Length: 7

If MEASURE TYPE = COUNT, the count should be supplied in this field.

Sample / Valid Value:

2

8-10​

Fields not collected. Must be delimited in template file.

11 - CATEGORY 4​

RequiredKeyMax Length: 10

Sample / Valid Value:

See Appendix AE for a complete list of valid values.

TITLE1STUD

Rules​

See the Rules Section of the Template Domain for rules consistent throughout all templates

Sample​

Sample Title I Submission for the District Fact Template

note

note that NC stands for Not Collected

Submitting AUNSchool Year DateCategory 1Category 2Category 3Measure TypeCountAMOUNT%NCCategory 4NCNCNCNCNCNCNCNCNCNC
1234567892024-06-30NONPUBSERVEDTOTALCOUNT8TITLE1STUD
1234567892024-06-30TASETHNICITY1COUNT10TITLE1STUD
1234567892024-06-30TASETHNICITY9COUNT10TITLE1STUD
1234567892024-06-30TASETHNICITY3COUNT10TITLE1STUD
1234567892024-06-30TASETHNICITY4COUNT10TITLE1STUD
1234567892024-06-30TASETHNICITY10COUNT10TITLE1STUD
1234567892024-06-30TASETHNICITY5COUNT10TITLE1STUD
1234567892024-06-30TASETHNICITY6COUNT10TITLE1STUD
1234567892024-06-30SWPETHNICITY1COUNT10TITLE1STUD
1234567892024-06-30SWPETHNICITY9COUNT10TITLE1STUD
1234567892024-06-30SWPETHNICITY3COUNT10TITLE1STUD
1234567892024-06-30SWPETHNICITY4COUNT10TITLE1STUD
1234567892024-06-30SWPETHNICITY10COUNT10TITLE1STUD
1234567892024-06-30SWPETHNICITY5COUNT10TITLE1STUD
1234567892024-06-30SWPETHNICITY6COUNT10TITLE1STUD

1234567892024-06-30PUBSWPGRADEA02COUNT5TITLE1STUD
1234567892024-06-30NONPUBGRADEA02COUNT5TITLE1STUD
